DeleteInstance.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
DeleteInstance.instanceId: The ID of the RapidFS instance to be released
DeleteInstance.token:
• First call: If this parameter is left empty or omitted, the system will generate and return a temporary token;
• Second call: Required. Pass in the token returned from the first call; the system will validate it and determine whether to accept the instance release request based on the validation result.
